title: Nursery Rhyme. LXVIII. Tales.
content:
Old Abram Brown is dead and gone,
            You'll never see him more;
        He used to wear a long brown coat,
            That button'd down before.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. LXVIII. Tales."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
